title: Fix handling of cases that look like sva labels again.

features.name: case item with localparam identifier and assert statement
features.description: Code should include a case statement where a case item uses a localparam identifier followed by an assert statement, triggering SVA label parsing

features.name: case item expression that resembles SVA label syntax
features.description: Code should include a case item where the expression looks like an SVA label (identifier followed by colon in case context)
